headline: Paycom Software Inc. (NYSE:PAYC) Passes the Peter Lynch GARP Investment Test
summary: Paycom Software (PAYC) aligns with Peter Lynch's GARP strategy, showing strong earnings growth, a low PEG ratio, high profitability, and zero debt.
